subject: Swift-BAT triggers 1212787, 1212789 are not astrophysical.
body:
P. A. Evans (U Leicester), C. Gronwall (PSU) and
K. L. Page (U Leicester) report on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift
Observatory Team:

Swift triggers 1212787 and 1212789 were caused by a star track
loss-of-lock  event, and are not interesting events.
